GEO Surface Test Page

Below is the SSR Answer Block. If you inspect the DOM, you will see the invisible JSON-LD schema and the AI link tags bound perfectly to the visible text.

When are SNAP benefits deposited in California?

In California, CalFresh (SNAP) benefits are deposited onto EBT cards during the first 10 days of the month, based on the last digit of your case number.

Event Date:First 10 days of every month (PT)
Status:CONFIRMED
Last Verified (UTC):2026-03-03T00:00:00Z
Trust Breakdown:Verify Cryptographic Proof

The 4-3-2 Authority Protocol

Dates are modeled via Treasury ACH file-release patterns. Standard bank settlement occurs at 8:30 AM ET on the payment date. Direct Express deposits do not participate in early release windows.

Independent Data Platform

Not affiliated with the SSA, VA, or USDA.
Deterministic logic cross-verified against Reddit "hit" sentiment data.
